title: Roasted Italian Eggplant Tagine
description: A roasted Italian dish featuring eggplant, tamarind paste, and a blend of Italian spices, cooked in a Korean brass bowl, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a Korean brass bowl, combine the eggplant, olive oil, garlic, onion, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper, and toss to coat.
Roast the eggplant mixture in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tamarind paste and crushed tomatoes.
After the eggplant has roasted for 30 minutes, pour the tamarind paste and tomato mixture over the eggplant and stir to combine.
Return the bowl to the oven and roast for an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the bowl from the oven and top the eggplant mixture with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Return the bowl to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
